urdu transliteration text:
Punjabi/Urdu Salaam
Urdu Translated by Semee Shah
Composed by Hyder Shah  Reciter: Mehboob Shah
Sept. 15, 2018
Ho nana jis ka shehr e ilm  or baap uska darwaza
english translation text: The one whose Grandfather is the  city of knowledge and His Father  is the door of knowledge

urdu transliteration text: Nahi samaj aati uss bekus ka  Kyun teero mein hai janaza
english translation text: How can one understand how He  was martyred while his dead body  was supported by arrows!

urdu transliteration text: Jida na na ilm da shehr ho we  Attay pyu howay darwaza
english translation text: The one whose Grandfather is the  city of knowledge and His Father  is the door of knowledge

urdu transliteration text: Nahi samaj aandi uss Zainab da  Kiwe ruliya sham janaza
english translation text: How can one understand why  BiBi Zainab(sa) was buried in  Sham

urdu transliteration text: Kuch rehem ager ye karlete  In zalimo ka kya jata
english translation text: If only these oppressors could  have some mercy

urdu transliteration text: Aik ghoont jo paani dey daitay  Mera Asghar to bach jataa
english translation text: If they only gave a sip of water,  My Asghar would have been  saved

urdu transliteration text: Ghut paani zaalim je dey daiday  Mera asghar tay bach janda
english translation text: If they only gave a sip of water,  My Asghar would have been  saved

urdu transliteration text: KivaiN khabar deinwa ja sugra noo  Kithay dubeya chan Zahra daa
english translation text: How can I tell BiBi Sughra about  How BiBi Zahra’s son was martyred

urdu transliteration text: Maktal mein rootee jatee thee  Karti thee baba baba
english translation text: In maqtal (BiBi Sakina) was  desperately crying and calling  “Father,Father!”

urdu transliteration text:
Eik laashe se awaaz aai  Aa meri ghood mein ajaa
A headless body replied back  “Come in my lap”
Maktal vich digde dheinde raee  deinde pyu nu awwasaN
english translation text: In maqtal (BiBi Sakina) was  desperately crying and calling  “Father,Father!”

urdu transliteration text:
Eik laashay toN awwaz aiye  Aa meri lassh te aaja
A headless body replied back  “Come in my lap”

Faryad kare nale zaar rowe  jeidi laadli Aun di maa di
(Sakina) Crying and complaining to  BiBi Zainab
Nahi labda baba maktal vich  Katti gardan ae laasha di
english translation text: Complaing… that all dead bodies  are headless and she can’t find  Her Father
